examples: This paper mainly researched into the gold tailing which could be used to make minicrystal glass granite.
Glass-ceramics material which is composed of uniform distribution glass phase and minicrystal phase, can be prepared by the parent glass via controlling the behavior of crystallization.
Through experiments, the improvement can reduce the content of minicrystal to 31.8 percent, compared with an original protective plate without a through hole for the cooled air to circulate.
